name: Confetti Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 small Green Pepper, Cut Into Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all of the ingredients to a blender container.
2. Blend until the vegetables are finely chopped.
3. Chill the mixture before serving.
4. Stir the mixture before spooning the dressing over salad greens.
Makes approximately 2 1/3 cups of dressing.
